## Checklist

- [ ] Stories: Storybook stories added/updated
- [ ] Types: TypeScript types are correct and exported
- [ ] Docs: GLOSSARY.md updated if new tokens added
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:ci && pnpm build` passes
